instruction: I just made some changes to my personal site and checked out master, but now I can't find those changes. Please help me find them and merge them into master.
finalMessage:
Recovered commit `d97f230` (“Move to Stanford”) from the reflog and merged it into `master`.

- Merge commit: `9281e37`
- Conflicts resolved
- Working tree clean
- Build not run because `bundle` is unavailable.

trajectory.summary:
git status --short --branch && printf '
--- branches ---
' && git branch -avv && printf '
--- reflog ---
' && git reflog --all --date=iso -n 30 && printf '
--- recent graph ---
' && git log --all --graph --decorate

git show --stat --oneline --decorate d97f230 && printf '
--- commit ---
' && git show --format=fuller --no-ext-diff d97f230 && printf '
--- ancestry ---
' && git merge-base master d97f230 && git log --graph --oneline

git merge --no-edit d97f2302d053c68f1d3a5f2397e2e75853b71ec1; rc=$?; printf '
--- status ---
'; git status --short --branch; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then printf '
--- conflicts ---
'; git diff --name-only --diff-filter=U;

git show d97f230:_includes/about.md > _includes/about.md && git add _includes/about.md _layouts/default.html && git commit --no-edit && printf '\n--- resulting history ---\n' && git log --graph --decorate --oneline -n 6
